name: sage-agent
description: SAGE-AGENT — offline-first, thick-client mobile AI companion. The device is the agent; the backend extends its reach.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared-types packages/sse-contract packages/tool-registry packages/arbiter-core packages/voice-core packages/sandbox-core packages/memory-core apps/backend

comment: apps/mobile is intentionally excluded from npm workspaces. React Native / Expo manage their own dependency tree and must be installed with the mobile toolchain (see apps/mobile/README.md). The container installs only the testable, platform-agnostic packages and the backend.
